currentPhase.label: Portal Pilot Prep and Release Control
currentPhase.summary: Phase 5 pilot prep and release control are active: the public site, capture layer, guided media publishing, private access shell, operator reporting, and pilot write gate are ready. Privacy and Terms owner approval is recorded; fresh pilot write evidence must be rerun for the current deployed build before final release.

completion.basis: Audited delivery estimate; public launch readiness is measured separately from the full ecosystem.

phaseMap.label: Authenticated Portal Shell and Release Control
Role/Tier Matrix and Screened Intake Routing

activeWorkstreams.label: Capture, Legal, Seed, Boundary Closeout
activeWorkstreams.summary: Capture, media, reporting, domain, inbox, pilot write-gate, legal closeout, and boundary work are ready. Privacy and Terms owner approval is recorded; pilot write evidence must be refreshed before final release.

activeWorkstreams.label: Private Portal Shell
activeWorkstreams.summary: Portal and sign-in routes are private-access shells with screened request paths, protected queue reporting, and no account entitlement promises.

activeWorkstreams.label: Role/Tier Matrix and Screened Intake Routing
activeWorkstreams.summary: Public role paths, inquiry keys, routing queues, and private handoff payloads are defined and QA-covered before any external workflow target is selected.

activeWorkstreams.label: Public Media MVP Workstream
activeWorkstreams.summary: Listen, Watch, and Radio preview sources are live. Guided publishing, rollback, lifecycle reporting, fan reactions, retention signals, and protected review shortcuts are ready; approved production media remains required.

deferredBoundaries.label: Internal Systems Bridge
deferredBoundaries.rule: Keep internal app logic outside the public repo until the bridge contract is approved server-side.

deferredBoundaries.label: Paid Membership and Commerce
deferredBoundaries.rule: Keep store and membership waitlist-only until purchase, refund, and membership terms are approved.

nextDecisions.label: External Workflow Target
nextDecisions.summary: Private operator reporting now recommends the next target from real routing demand. Choose Google Workspace, an approved external CRM, an operator build-packet bridge, or an approved private workflow only after the receiver owner and workflow are approved.

nextDecisions.label: Privacy and Terms Approval
nextDecisions.summary: Owner/business approval is recorded for the reviewed Privacy and Terms pages.

nextDecisions.label: Fresh Pilot Write Evidence
nextDecisions.summary: Pilot write evidence is outside the freshness window. Rerun the live pilot write gate before final release.
